description_long: This is a heavily armored, early 20th-century combat vehicle with a boxy, riveted steel body and a cylindrical rotating turret mounted on top. The vehicle features a prominent front grille, solid metal wheels with thin tires, and a side door for crew entry. The turret is equipped with a visible gun barrel, and the body is adorned with bold white cross insignias on the turret and side panels. The armor plating covers the entire vehicle, including the engine compartment, sides, and rear, with visible rivets and reinforced panels. The paint scheme is a uniform dark gray, giving it a utilitarian and intimidating appearance, while the wheels and undercarriage show functional, rugged construction.
description: A dark gray, heavily armored combat vehicle with a cylindrical turret, gun barrel, and bold white cross insignias. It features riveted steel plating, solid metal wheels, and a utilitarian, robust design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the armored grille, narrow front profile, and the turret with a white cross insignia on top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the cylindrical turret with gun barrel, side door, and large white cross insignias on the turret and side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the armored back panel, rear wheel covers, and the back of the turret.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the turret, gun barrel, and white cross insignia on the side panel.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible gun barrel mounted on the cylindrical turret located on the roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, riveted steel armor plating, including reinforced panels on the front, sides, and rear.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark gray color with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White cross insignias on the turret top and both side panels.
attribute_tire_type: Four solid metal wheels with thin, smooth tires; no visible tread pattern.
